title: LMT-Atlas v1.0
description: Datasette-backed release for the Lipase Methanol Tolerance Atlas, built from Phase 1.5 LTS outputs plus five representative enzyme pages.

homepage_stats.title: Homepage Stats
homepage_stats.description: Top-level counts for the v1.0 static release homepage.

representative_pages.title: Representative Enzyme Pages
representative_pages.description: Five manually closed representative enzyme pages used for the v1.0 release.

variant_summary.title: Variant Summary
variant_summary.description: Construct-level summary with official Phase 1.5 LTS_ref, CI, confidence_LTS, tolerance_tier, archive-only strict LTS_label, and archived tolerance_class_v0.

all_enzyme_index.title: All Enzyme Index
all_enzyme_index.description: Frozen web-publication canonical Browse Enzymes index left-joined to official Stage 6 LTS fields.

evidence_measurement.title: Evidence Measurement
evidence_measurement.description: Phase 1.5 measurement-level evidence table with D_obs and protocol linkage.

source_reference.title: Source Reference
source_reference.description: Deduplicated literature DOI and patent publication sources.

enzyme_page_browser.title: Representative Enzyme Pages
enzyme_page_browser.sql:
select page_id, short_name, standard_name, source_species_normalized,
                       root_canonical_id, wt_tolerance, best_engineered_variant,
                       best_engineered_variant_tolerance, median_variant_tolerance,
                       literature_direct_rows, patent_direct_rows, protocol_matrix_count
                from representative_pages
                order by short_name

page_variant_listing.title: Variants By Representative Page
page_variant_listing.sql:
select canonical_enzyme_id, construct_display_name, LTS_ref,
                       LTS_ref_ci_low, LTS_ref_ci_high, confidence_LTS, LTS_label,
                       fit_status, literature_evidence_count, patent_evidence_count,
                       measurement_row_count, protocol_unit_count, variant_page_path
                from variant_summary
                where (:page_id = '' or page_id = :page_id)
                order by LTS_ref asc, measurement_row_count desc, canonical_enzyme_id

variant_page_summary.title: Variant Page Summary
variant_page_summary.sql:
select *
                from variant_summary
                where (:canonical_enzyme_id = '' or canonical_enzyme_id = :canonical_enzyme_id)
                order by canonical_enzyme_id

variant_measurements.title: Variant Measurements
variant_measurements.sql:
select display_canonical_id, construct_display_name, source_type, source_key,
                       methanol_conc_percent, incubation_time_h, incubation_temp_C,
                       residual_activity_percent, evidence_confidence_tier, LTS_ref,
                       LTS_ref_ci_low, LTS_ref_ci_high, confidence_LTS, LTS_label,
                       fit_status, D_obs, protocol_id, page_or_figure_anchor, source_figure_table_id
                from evidence_measurement
                where (:canonical_enzyme_id = '' or display_canonical_id = :canonical_enzyme_id)
                order by methanol_conc_percent desc, incubation_time_h desc, residual_activity_percent desc

evidence_table_filterable.title: Evidence Table Filterable
evidence_table_filterable.sql:
select evidence_id, display_canonical_id, construct_display_name, source_type,
                       source_key, methanol_conc_percent, incubation_time_h, incubation_temp_C,
                       residual_activity_percent, evidence_confidence_tier, LTS_ref,
                       LTS_ref_ci_low, LTS_ref_ci_high, confidence_LTS, LTS_label,
                       fit_status, D_obs, protocol_id, page_or_figure_anchor, source_figure_table_id
                from evidence_measurement
                where (:source_type = '' or source_type = :source_type)
                  and (:confidence_tier = '' or evidence_confidence_tier = :confidence_tier)
                  and (:min_methanol = '' or methanol_conc_percent >= cast(:min_methanol as real))
                  and (:max_methanol = '' or methanol_conc_percent <= cast(:max_methanol as real))
                  and (:min_time = '' or incubation_time_h >= cast(:min_time as real))
                  and (:max_time = '' or incubation_time_h <= cast(:max_time as real))
                order by methanol_conc_percent desc, incubation_time_h desc, residual_activity_percent desc

source_lookup.title: Source Reference Lookup
source_lookup.sql:
select *
                from source_reference
                where (:source_key = ''
                       or source_key = :source_key
                       or doi = :source_key
                       or patent_publication_number = :source_key)
                order by evidence_row_count desc, source_key

global_search.title: Global Search
global_search.sql:
select entity_type, entity_id, label, subtitle, page_id, static_path, datasette_path
                from global_search_index
                where (:q = '' or lower(search_text) like '%' || lower(:q) || '%')
                order by entity_type, label
                limit 100

browse_enzymes.title: Browse Enzymes
browse_enzymes.sql:
select canonical_enzyme_id, display_name, canonical_species, entity_role,
                       parent_canonical_id, enzyme_ec_number, uniprot_id, pdb_ids,
                       structure_modeling_readiness, LTS_ref, LTS_ref_ci_low,
                       LTS_ref_ci_high, confidence_LTS, LTS_label, fit_status,
                       measurement_row_count, protocol_unit_count, evidence_source_mix,
                       evidence_status, variant_page_path
                from all_enzyme_index
                order by canonical_enzyme_id

enzyme_page_browser.sql:
select page_id, short_name, standard_name, source_species_normalized,
                       root_canonical_id, wt_tolerance, best_engineered_variant,
